turns.query: Analyze the emission patterns and air quality impacts of STEEL versus POWER industries in Tangshan City (city_id: 2) from 2025-06-01 to 2025-06-05. Compare daily emission profiles, assess which industry type has greater influence on nearby monitoring stations, and determine optimal emission control priorities.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 步骤1: 查询唐山市的STEEL和POWER企业
query_companies = text("""
SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.industry_type, pc.district_id, d.name as district_name
FROM polluting_company pc
JOIN district d ON pc.district_id = d.id
WHERE pc.city_id = 2 AND pc.industry_type IN ('STEEL', 'POWER')
ORDER BY pc.industry_type, pc.id
""")
companies_df = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine)
print("=== 唐山市STEEL和POWER企业列表 ===")
print(companies_df.to_string())
print(f"\nSTEEL企业数量: {len(companies_df[companies_df['industry_type'] == 'STEEL'])}")
print(f"POWER企业数量: {len(companies_df[companies_df['industry_type'] == 'POWER'])}")

# 步骤2: 查询各企业在2025-06-01到2025-06-05期间的排放数据
# 时间窗口: 2025-06-01 00:00:00 到 2025-06-06 00:00:00 (不包括)
query_steel_emission = text("""
SELECT 
    hpc.company_id,
    pc.name as company_name,
    pc.industry_type,
    DATE(hpc.timestamp) as emission_date,
    hpc.timestamp,
    hpc.exhaust_gas,
    hpc.nox,
    hpc.so2,
    hpc.pm,
    hpc.co
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission hpc
JOIN polluting_company pc ON hpc.company_id = pc.id
WHERE pc.city_id = 2 
    AND pc.industry_type = 'STEEL'
    AND hpc.timestamp >= '2025-06-01 00:00:00'
    AND hpc.timestamp < '2025-06-06 00:00:00'
""")

query_power_emission = text("""
SELECT 
    hpc.company_id,
    pc.name as company_name,
    pc.industry_type,
    DATE(hpc.timestamp) as emission_date,
    hpc.timestamp,
    hpc.exhaust_gas,
    hpc.nox,
    hpc.so2,
    hpc.pm,
    hpc.co
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission hpc
JOIN polluting_company pc ON hpc.company_id = pc.id
WHERE pc.city_id = 2 
    AND pc.industry_type = 'POWER'
    AND hpc.timestamp >= '2025-06-01 00:00:00'
    AND hpc.timestamp < '2025-06-06 00:00:00'
""")

steel_emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_steel_emission, engine)
power_emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_power_emission, engine)

print(f"\n=== 钢铁企业排放数据 ===")
print(f"记录数: {len(steel_emission_df)}")
print(f"涉及企业数: {steel_emission_df['company_id'].nunique()}")
print(f"总烟气量: {steel_emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum():.2f}")

print(f"\n=== 电力企业排放数据 ===")
print(f"记录数: {len(power_emission_df)}")
print(f"涉及企业数: {power_emission_df['company_id'].nunique()}")
print(f"总烟气量: {power_emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum():.2f}")

# 步骤3: 计算每日排放汇总
print("\n=== 钢铁企业每日排放汇总 ===")
steel_daily = steel_emission_df.groupby('emission_date').agg(
    total_exhaust_gas=('exhaust_gas', 'sum'),
    total_nox=('nox', 'sum'),
    total_so2=('so2', 'sum'),
    total_pm=('pm', 'sum'),
    total_co=('co', 'sum'),
    company_count=('company_id', 'nunique')
).reset_index()
print(steel_daily.to_string())

print("\n=== 电力企业每日排放汇总 ===")
power_daily = power_emission_df.groupby('emission_date').agg(
    total_exhaust_gas=('exhaust_gas', 'sum'),
    total_nox=('nox', 'sum'),
    total_so2=('so2', 'sum'),
    total_pm=('pm', 'sum'),
    total_co=('co', 'sum'),
    company_count=('company_id', 'nunique')
).reset_index()
print(power_daily.to_string())

# 步骤4: 存储任务要求的变量
total_steel_flue_gas = float(steel_emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum())
total_power_flue_gas = float(power_emission_df['exhaust_gas'].sum())
steel_company_count = int(steel_emission_df['company_id'].nunique())
power_company_count = int(power_emission_df['company_id'].nunique())

print(f"\n=== 任务要求存储的变量 ===")
print(f"total_steel_flue_gas: {total_steel_flue_gas}")
print(f"total_power_flue_gas: {total_power_flue_gas}")
print(f"steel_company_count: {steel_company_count}")
print(f"power_company_count: {power_company_count}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text
import numpy as np

# 步骤5: 获取唐山市的空气质量站点
query_stations = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name as district_name, 
       ST_X(aqs.coordinate::geometry) as longitude, ST_Y(aqs.coordinate::geometry) as latitude
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
WHERE aqs.city_id = 2
ORDER BY aqs.station_type, aqs.id
""")
stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print(f"=== 唐山市空气质量站点 ({len(stations_df)}个) ===")
print(stations_df.to_string())

# 步骤6: 获取STEEL和POWER企业的坐标信息
query_company_coords = text("""
SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.industry_type, pc.district_id, d.name as district_name,
       ST_X(pc.coordinate::geometry) as longitude, ST_Y(pc.coordinate::geometry) as latitude
FROM polluting_company pc
JOIN district d ON pc.district_id = d.id
WHERE pc.city_id = 2 AND pc.industry_type IN ('STEEL', 'POWER')
""")
company_coords_df = pd.read_sql(query_company_coords, engine)
print(f"\n=== 企业坐标信息 ===")
print(f"STEEL企业: {len(company_coords_df[company_coords_df['industry_type'] == 'STEEL'])}个")
print(f"POWER企业: {len(company_coords_df[company_coords_df['industry_type'] == 'POWER'])}个")

# 步骤7: 分析各站点附近(5公里内)的STEEL和POWER企业排放贡献
# 先获取站点坐标的地理对象
query_station_emission_impact = text("""
WITH steel_emission_near_station AS (
    SELECT 
        aqs.id as station_id,
        aqs.name as station_name,
        aqs.station_type,
        d.name as district_name,
        SUM(hpc.exhaust_gas) as total_steel_exhaust_gas,
        SUM(hpc.nox) as total_steel_nox,
        SUM(hpc.so2) as total_steel_so2,
        SUM(hpc.pm) as total_steel_pm,
        COUNT(DISTINCT hpc.company_id) as steel_company_count
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
    JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission hpc ON hpc.company_id IN (
        SELECT pc.id FROM polluting_company pc 
        WHERE pc.city_id = 2 AND pc.industry_type = 'STEEL'
        AND ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, aqs.coordinate, 5000)
    )
    WHERE aqs.city_id = 2
        AND hpc.timestamp >= '2025-06-01 00:00:00'
        AND hpc.timestamp < '2025-06-06 00:00:00'
    GROUP BY aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name
),
power_emission_near_station AS (
    SELECT 
        aqs.id as station_id,
        aqs.name as station_name,
        aqs.station_type,
        d.name as district_name,
        SUM(hpc.exhaust_gas) as total_power_exhaust_gas,
        SUM(hpc.nox) as total_power_nox,
        SUM(hpc.so2) as total_power_so2,
        SUM(hpc.pm) as total_power_pm,
        COUNT(DISTINCT hpc.company_id) as power_company_count
    FROM air_quality_station aqs
    JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
    JOIN hourly_polluting_company_emission hpc ON hpc.company_id IN (
        SELECT pc.id FROM polluting_company pc 
        WHERE pc.city_id = 2 AND pc.industry_type = 'POWER'
        AND ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, aqs.coordinate, 5000)
    )
    WHERE aqs.city_id = 2
        AND hpc.timestamp >= '2025-06-01 00:00:00'
        AND hpc.timestamp < '2025-06-06 00:00:00'
    GROUP BY aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.station_type, d.name
)
SELECT 
    s.station_id,
    s.station_name,
    s.station_type,
    s.district_name,
    s.total_steel_exhaust_gas,
    s.total_steel_nox,
    s.total_steel_so2,
    s.total_steel_pm,
    s.steel_company_count,
    p.total_power_exhaust_gas,
    p.total_power_nox,
    p.total_power_so2,
    p.total_power_pm,
    p.power_company_count
FROM steel_emission_near_station s
LEFT JOIN power_emission_near_station p ON s.station_id = p.station_id
ORDER BY s.total_steel_exhaust_gas DESC
""")
station_impact_df = pd.read_sql(query_station_emission_impact, engine)
print(f"\n=== 各站点附近STEEL和POWER企业排放影响 ===")
print(station_impact_df.to_string())

# 步骤8: 分析空气质量数据与排放的关系
# 获取2025-06-01到2025-06-05期间唐山市各站点的空气质量数据
query_air_quality = text("""
SELECT 
    hsaq.station_id,
    aqs.name as station_name,
    aqs.station_type,
    d.name as district_name,
    DATE(hsaq.timestamp) as air_date,
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM hsaq.timestamp) as hour,
    hsaq.aqi,
    hsaq.pm2_5,
    hsaq.pm10,
    hsaq.so2,
    hsaq.no2,
    hsaq.co,
    hsaq.primary_pollutants
FROM hourly_station_air_quality hsaq
JOIN air_quality_station aqs ON hsaq.station_id = aqs.id
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
WHERE aqs.city_id = 2
    AND hsaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-01 00:00:00'
    AND hsaq.timestamp < '2025-06-06 00:00:00'
""")
air_quality_df = pd.read_sql(query_air_quality, engine)
print(f"\n=== 空气质量数据概况 ===")
print(f"记录数: {len(air_quality_df)}")
print(f"站点数: {air_quality_df['station_id'].nunique()}")
print(f"日期范围: {air_quality_df['air_date'].min()} 到 {air_quality_df['air_date'].max()}")

# 步骤9: 按日期和站点类型汇总空气质量
print("\n=== 各站点类型每日平均空气质量 ===")
aqi_summary = air_quality_df.groupby(['air_date', 'station_type']).agg(
    avg_aqi=('aqi', 'mean'),
    avg_pm2_5=('pm2_5', 'mean'),
    avg_pm10=('pm10', 'mean'),
    avg_so2=('so2', 'mean'),
    avg_no2=('no2', 'mean'),
    avg_co=('co', 'mean'),
    max_aqi=('aqi', 'max')
).reset_index()
print(aqi_summary.to_string())

# 步骤10: 分析STEEL和POWER企业排放的日变化模式
print("\n=== STEEL企业排放小时分布 ===")
steel_hourly = steel_emission_df.groupby('hour').agg(
    avg_exhaust_gas=('exhaust_gas', 'mean'),
    avg_nox=('nox', 'mean'),
    avg_so2=('so2', 'mean'),
    avg_pm=('pm', 'mean')
).reset_index()
print(steel_hourly.to_string())

print("\n=== POWER企业排放小时分布 ===")
power_hourly = power_emission_df.groupby('hour').agg(
    avg_exhaust_gas=('exhaust_gas', 'mean'),
    avg_nox=('nox', 'mean'),
    avg_so2=('so2', 'mean'),
    avg_pm=('pm', 'mean')
).reset_index()
print(power_hourly.to_string())
